title: Trampling
body:
[![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/v0Og01bf?logo=modrinth&color=dark_green)](https://modrinth.com/mod/trampling/versions)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/786967180431458355?logo=discord&color=blue)](https://discord.com/invite/eNwkve8k7c)
[![GitHub Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/sf-inc/trampling?logo=github&color=white)](https://github.com/sf-inc/trampling/issues)

**NO PORT TO FORGE PLANNED!** *(but feel free to port it by yourself and link it)*

***The mod is fully configurable to enable only changes that you like***

# Description

Yet another "no trample" mod... But for Fabric and up-to-date with some other features!

- Do not turn farmland into dirt when landing upon if you wear **Leather Boots**, similarly to snow powder behavior, or if you wear boots with **Feather Falling** enchantment at any level.
- This now uses item tags and enchantment tags to allow you to add other foot armor items or foot armor enchantments to the list
- Crops can be **broken** when walking on it, you should make your fields safe. Default 5% chance to break.
- Crops growth can be **stunned** when walking on it. Default 80% chance to stun, and 10% chance to remove stun status each time it tries to grow.
- Crops breaking and growth stunning can be avoided the same way that landing upon on farmland, OR if **sneaking**
- Crops breaking and growth stunning applies also to each mob if the *mob griefing* rule is enabled

# FAQ

- **Do I need it on my server?** Yes, it works on a server. File **not** needed for client if on server.

- **Can I include it in my modpack?** Yes, you are free to include this mod into your modpack

- **For any other things:** Feel free to share your experience, problems, enhancement ideas in the Discord server, or directly creating issues on the GitHub
